info.title: Contact Information
info.description: You can also reach me directly through these channels.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about my services and how I work.

cta.description: I'm available to answer all your questions and discuss your project.

process.question: How does a project with you work?
process.answer: Each project starts with a discussion to understand your needs and goals. I then propose a mockup for validation, followed by the development of your site. You're involved at every step to ensure a result that meets your expectations.

timeline.question: What are the delivery timelines?
timeline.answer: A classic showcase site typically takes 2 to 3 weeks. For a premium showcase site, expect 3 to 5 weeks. An online store requires 4 to 6 weeks. These timelines may vary depending on complexity and your responsiveness for approvals.

pricing.question: How are your prices calculated?
pricing.answer: My prices are based on the type of site (showcase, premium, online store) and the desired features. I provide a detailed and transparent quote before any commitment. No surprises: the announced price is the final price.

maintenance.question: Do you offer site maintenance?
maintenance.answer: Yes, I offer a monthly package that covers hosting, security updates, regular backups, and small modifications. This allows you to focus on your business with peace of mind.

autonomy.question: Will I be able to modify my site myself?
autonomy.answer: Depending on your needs, I can integrate a simple admin interface to manage your content (texts, images, blog posts). Training is included to make you autonomous for common modifications.

payment.question: How does the 3-installment payment work?
payment.answer: Payment is split across 3 project milestones: 40% upon signing the quote to start work, 30% upon mockup approval, and 30% at final delivery. This is not a credit arrangement — each payment corresponds to a concrete delivered milestone. You only pay for what's done. Bank transfer only.
